tests.name: simple function call
tests.code: int add(int a, int b) {    return a + b;}print(add(2, 3));

tests.name: function calling function
tests.code: int add(int a, int b) { return a + b; }  int inc(int x) { return add(x, 1); }print(inc(4));

tests.name: function modifying a variable
tests.code_disabled: int x = 10;  int inc() { return x + 1;}  print(inc());

tests.name: recursive factorial
tests.code: int fact(int n) {    if (n <= 1) { return 1; }    return n * fact(n - 1);}print(fact(5));

tests.name: function with multiple returns
tests.code: int absval(int x) {if (x < 0) { return -x; }    return x;}  print(absval(-9));

tests.name: float params accept int
tests.code: float add(float a, float b) { return a + b; } print(add(1, 2));

tests.name: int truncation on assignment
tests.code: int x = 0; x = 3.7; print(x); x = -1.7; print(x);

tests.name: type builtin
tests.code: int x = 5; float y = 2.5; print(type(x)); print(type(y)); print(type(1.2 + x));
